channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Prompt Engineering
channel.description: Latest Prompt Engineering news in Context Engineering

item.title: Stop Automating Peer Review Without Rigorous Evaluation
item.description: arXiv:2605.03202v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models offer a tempting solution to address the peer review crisis. This position paper argues that today's AI systems should not be used to produce paper reviews. We ground this position in an empirical comparison of human- versus AI-g...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> prompting, ICL, LLM, arxiv, prompt | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Context-Engineering - "Context engineering is the delicate art and science of filling the context window with just the right information for the next step." — Andrej Karpathy. A frontier, first-principles handbook inspired by Karpathy and 3Blue1Brown for moving beyond prompt engineering to the wider discipline of context design, orchestration, and optimization.
item.description: "Context engineering is the delicate art and science of filling the context window with just the right information for the next step." — Andrej Karpathy. A frontier, first-principles handbook inspired by Karpathy and 3Blue1Brown for moving beyond prompt engineering to the wider discipline of context design, orchestration, and optimization.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context window, context, prompt engineering, prompt | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Self-Prompting Small Language Models for Privacy-Sensitive Clinical Information Extraction
item.description: arXiv:2605.04221v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Clinical named entity recognition from dental progress notes is challenging because documentation is highly unstructured, domain-specific, and often privacy-sensitive. We developed a locally deployable framework that enables small language models to s...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> prompting, framework, arxiv, fine-tuning, prompt | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Claude-Code-Everything-You-Need-to-Know - The ultimate all-in-one guide to mastering Claude Code. From setup, prompt engineering, commands, hooks, workflows, automation, and integrations, to MCP servers, tools, and the BMAD method—packed with step-by-step tutorials, real-world examples, and expert strategies to make this the global go-to repo for Claude mastery.
item.description: The ultimate all-in-one guide to mastering Claude Code. From setup, prompt engineering, commands, hooks, workflows, automation, and integrations, to MCP servers, tools, and the BMAD method—packed with step-by-step tutorials, real-world examples, and expert strategies to make this the global go-to repo for Claude mastery.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> example, tool, prompt, step-by-step, prompt engineering | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: AlphaCodium - Official implementation for the paper: "Code Generation with AlphaCodium: From Prompt Engineering to Flow Engineering""
item.description: Official implementation for the paper: "Code Generation with AlphaCodium: From Prompt Engineering to Flow Engineering""<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> paper, prompt engineering, prompt | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>

item.title: vLLM V0 to V1: Correctness Before Corrections in RL

item.title: optillm - Optimizing inference proxy for LLMs
